steps.t: Thane Sparhafoc wants you to search for this boar-totem in the swamps. Tova mentioned that it was just south-east of Fenmarch.
You have located the boar-totem in the swamps. Get a closer look and investigate the totem.
Upon investigating the boar totem, a group of Orcs attacks. Defeat the attacking Orcs.
There is little doubt in your mind that the attacking Orcs are connected with the boar-totems found around Eastfold. Return to Thane Sparhafoc and inf…
